docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,371.50 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ABADILLA, TERRENCE R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABADILLA, TERRENCE R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABADILLA, TERRENCE R. $2,371.50 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,412.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ABADILLA, TERRENCE R.
